subcodes.first_line: This is the day whereon all the loved ones must fix their gaze upon the All-Bountiful and arise to serve the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که کل احباب باید بشطر وهاب ناظر باشند و بخدمت امر الله قیام نمایند
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @spiritual transformation
